_comment: PF2e feats — general, skill, and class feats from the ORC-licensed SRD

toughness.name: Toughness
toughness.note: Gain HP equal to your level (modeled as +1 per level via bonuses.hp scaling)

shield_block.name: Shield Block
shield_block.note: Reaction: reduce damage by shield hardness, shield takes remaining damage

armor_proficiency.name: Armor Proficiency
armor_proficiency.note: Gain trained proficiency in one armor category

weapon_proficiency.name: Weapon Proficiency
weapon_proficiency.note: Gain trained proficiency in one weapon group

canny_acumen_fortitude.name: Canny Acumen (Fortitude)
canny_acumen_fortitude.note: Increase proficiency in Fortitude to expert (or master at 17+)

diehard.name: Diehard
diehard.note: You die at dying 5 instead of dying 4

fast_recovery.name: Fast Recovery
fast_recovery.note: Regain double HP from rest; +4 to recover from diseases and poisons

assurance.name: Assurance
assurance.note: Forgo rolling and use 10 + proficiency for a specific skill

battle_medicine.name: Battle Medicine
battle_medicine.note: Attempt a Medicine check to heal in combat (1 action)

steady_balance.name: Steady Balance
steady_balance.note: Treat success as critical success on Balance checks

titan_wrestler.name: Titan Wrestler
titan_wrestler.note: Grapple creatures up to two sizes larger

power_attack.name: Power Attack
power_attack.note: 2 actions: Strike at full bonus with extra weapon damage dice

intimidating_strike.name: Intimidating Strike
intimidating_strike.note: 2 actions: Strike that frightens on hit

knockdown.name: Knockdown
knockdown.note: 2 actions: Strike then free Trip on hit

swipe.name: Swipe
swipe.note: 2 actions: Strike two adjacent foes with one attack roll

twin_feint.name: Twin Feint
twin_feint.note: 2 actions: Strike with two weapons, second is flat-footed

gang_up.name: Gang Up
gang_up.note: Enemies are flat-footed to you if within reach of you and an ally

reach_spell.name: Reach Spell
reach_spell.note: 1 additional action: increase spell range by 30 feet

counterspell.name: Counterspell
counterspell.note: Reaction: counter an enemy spell using the same spell

healing_hands.name: Healing Hands
healing_hands.note: Heal spells use d10s instead of d8s

harming_hands.name: Harming Hands
harming_hands.note: Harm spells use d10s instead of d8s

communal_healing.name: Communal Healing
communal_healing.note: When you heal a target, you regain HP equal to spell rank

adopted_ancestry.name: Adopted Ancestry
adopted_ancestry.note: Choose an ancestry other than your own. You can select ancestry feats from that ancestry.

breath_control.name: Breath Control
breath_control.note: Hold breath 25× as long. +1 circumstance to saves vs inhaled threats.

keen_follower.name: Keen Follower
keen_follower.note: Follow tracks without a check for common terrain.

ride.name: Ride
ride.note: Automatically succeed on Command an Animal to make your mount Stride.

untrained_improvisation.name: Untrained Improvisation
untrained_improvisation.note: Add half your level to untrained skill checks (full level at 7+).

expeditious_search.name: Expeditious Search
expeditious_search.note: Search at full speed instead of half speed.

incredible_investiture.name: Incredible Investiture
incredible_investiture.note: Invest up to 12 items instead of 10.

bon_mot.name: Bon Mot
bon_mot.note: 1 action: witty quip gives target -2 to Perception and Will saves until they respond.

charming_liar.name: Charming Liar
charming_liar.note: On critical success to Lie, target's attitude improves by one step.

experienced_professional.name: Experienced Professional
experienced_professional.note: Never critically fail to Earn Income, and gain higher earnings on success.

fascinating_performance.name: Fascinating Performance
fascinating_performance.note: Perform to fascinate observers (Will save vs Performance DC).

group_impression.name: Group Impression
group_impression.note: Make an Impression on up to 4 targets at once.

hefty_hauler.name: Hefty Hauler
hefty_hauler.note: Increase carrying capacity limits by 2 Bulk.

hobnobber.name: Hobnobber
hobnobber.note: Gather Information in half the normal time. On critical failure, no false info.

lie_to_me.name: Lie to Me
lie_to_me.note: Use Deception DC instead of Perception DC to detect lies against you.

natural_medicine.name: Natural Medicine
natural_medicine.note: Use Nature instead of Medicine for Treat Wounds in wilderness.

pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
pickpocket.note: Steal or Palm an Object from a creature who is not actively observing you.

quick_coercion.name: Quick Coercion
quick_coercion.note: Coerce a target in 1 round instead of 1 minute.

quick_jump.name: Quick Jump
quick_jump.note: High Jump or Long Jump as a single action.

quick_repair.name: Quick Repair
quick_repair.note: Repair an item in 1 action instead of 10 minutes.

recognize_spell.name: Recognize Spell
recognize_spell.note: Reaction: identify a spell being cast using the appropriate skill.

specialty_crafting.name: Specialty Crafting
specialty_crafting.note: +2 circumstance bonus to Craft items in a chosen specialty.

student_of_the_canon.name: Student of the Canon
student_of_the_canon.note: Critical failures on Religion checks to Decipher Writing or Recall Knowledge become failures.

subtle_theft.name: Subtle Theft
subtle_theft.note: When you successfully Steal, observers don't notice unless actively searching.

survey_wildlife.name: Survey Wildlife
survey_wildlife.note: Spend 10 minutes to learn about creatures in the area via tracks and signs.

terrain_expertise.name: Terrain Expertise
terrain_expertise.note: +2 circumstance bonus to Survival in a chosen terrain type.

train_animal.name: Train Animal
train_animal.note: Teach an animal a trick over the course of a week.

trick_magic_item.name: Trick Magic Item
trick_magic_item.note: Activate a magic item you normally couldn't by faking the required trait.

virtuosic_performer.name: Virtuosic Performer
virtuosic_performer.note: +1 circumstance bonus to Performance checks (+2 at master).

wary_disarmament.name: Wary Disarmament
wary_disarmament.note: +2 circumstance bonus to AC and saves triggered by traps you're disarming.

biographical_eye.name: Biographical Eye
biographical_eye.note: On a successful Recall Knowledge about a person, also learn their profession and one personality trait.

connections.name: Connections
connections.note: Leverage connections to gain meetings with important figures.

continual_recovery.name: Continual Recovery
continual_recovery.note: Treat Wounds cooldown reduced to 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.

glad_hand.name: Glad-Hand
glad_hand.note: Make an Impression during a round of Gathering Information.

intimidating_prowess.name: Intimidating Prowess
intimidating_prowess.note: +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation (+2 if you're master).

legendary_sneak.name: Legendary Sneak
legendary_sneak.note: Hide and Sneak without cover or concealment.

quick_disguise.name: Quick Disguise
quick_disguise.note: Create a disguise in 1 minute instead of 10.

robust_recovery.name: Robust Recovery
robust_recovery.note: On success Treat Disease or Treat Poison, treat as critical success.

shameless_request.name: Shameless Request
shameless_request.note: Reduce penalty for impossible or outrageous Requests.

terrified_retreat.name: Terrified Retreat
terrified_retreat.note: On critical success to Demoralize, target flees for 1 round.

wall_jump.name: Wall Jump
wall_jump.note: Leap off walls. Requires expert Athletics.

double_slice.name: Double Slice
double_slice.note: 2 actions: Strike with each weapon, combine MAP. Second Strike doesn't increase MAP.

exacting_strike.name: Exacting Strike
exacting_strike.note: 1 action: Strike that doesn't count toward MAP on miss.

point_blank_shot.name: Point-Blank Shot
point_blank_shot.note: Stance: ranged Strikes within first range increment ignore volley penalty and get +2 damage.

reactive_shield.name: Reactive Shield
reactive_shield.note: Reaction: Raise a Shield when attacked.

snagging_strike.name: Snagging Strike
snagging_strike.note: 1 action: Strike that makes target off-guard on hit.

aggressive_block.name: Aggressive Block
aggressive_block.note: Use Shield Block to push or make attacker off-guard.

assisting_shot.name: Assisting Shot
assisting_shot.note: 1 action: ranged Strike, on hit target is off-guard to next ally attack.

brutish_shove.name: Brutish Shove
brutish_shove.note: Strike with two-handed weapon, Shove on hit.

combat_grab.name: Combat Grab
combat_grab.note: 1 action: Strike, on hit you can Grab the target with free hand.

dueling_parry.name: Dueling Parry
dueling_parry.note: +2 AC while wielding one-handed weapon with free hand (1 action).

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.note: 1 action: Stride reach +5ft for next Strike.

double_shot.name: Double Shot
double_shot.note: 2 actions: Two ranged Strikes against different targets, each at -2.

dual_handed_assault.name: Dual-Handed Assault
dual_handed_assault.note: Free action: add two-hand damage die when wielding one-handed weapon in two hands.

felling_strike.name: Felling Strike
felling_strike.note: 2 actions: Strike a flying creature, on hit it falls.

incredible_aim.name: Incredible Aim
incredible_aim.note: 2 actions: ignore concealment and cover on next ranged Strike.

positioning_assault.name: Positioning Assault
positioning_assault.note: 2 actions: Strike, on hit move target 5ft to a space in your reach.

shatter_defenses.name: Shatter Defenses
shatter_defenses.note: On hit vs frightened, target is off-guard until end of your next turn.

stance_savant.name: Stance Savant
stance_savant.note: Free action: enter a stance at beginning of combat.

determination.name: Determination
determination.note: 1 action: end one nonpermanent spell or condition affecting you.

two_weapon_flurry.name: Two-Weapon Flurry
two_weapon_flurry.note: 2 actions: Strike once with each weapon (each applies own MAP).

whirlwind_strike.name: Whirlwind Strike
whirlwind_strike.note: 3 actions: Strike every creature within reach.

guiding_finish.name: Guiding Finish
guiding_finish.note: Strike, on hit move target 10ft within reach.

savage_critical.name: Savage Critical
savage_critical.note: Nat 19 on attack is a critical hit.

boundless_reprisals.name: Boundless Reprisals
boundless_reprisals.note: Unlimited Attacks of Opportunity per round.

trap_finder.name: Trap Finder
trap_finder.note: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception to find traps and to AC/saves vs traps.

youre_next.name: You're Next
youre_next.note: Reaction: Demoralize when an adjacent creature is reduced to 0 HP.

dread_striker.name: Dread Striker
dread_striker.note: Frightened creatures are off-guard to you.

mobility.name: Mobility
mobility.note: When Striding half your speed or less, that movement doesn't trigger reactions.

unbalancing_blow.name: Unbalancing Blow
unbalancing_blow.note: On critical hit, target is off-guard until start of your next turn.

battle_assessment.name: Battle Assessment
battle_assessment.note: 1 action: Recall Knowledge with Perception. On success, learn one combat stat.

deny_support.name: Deny Support
deny_support.note: Your target can't flank with allies.

preparation.name: Preparation
preparation.note: Prepared a readied action before initiative, you gain +2 circumstance bonus.

sneak_savant.name: Sneak Savant
sneak_savant.note: You can always Hide and Sneak even if observed.

precise_debilitations.name: Precise Debilitations
precise_debilitations.note: Your debilitations deal additional precision damage.

instant_opening.name: Instant Opening
instant_opening.note: 1 action: target is off-guard to next attack.

spring_from_the_shadows.name: Spring from the Shadows
spring_from_the_shadows.note: Stride and Strike from Hidden; target is off-guard.

cognitive_loophole.name: Cognitive Loophole
cognitive_loophole.note: Reaction: retry a failed Will save vs mental effect.

dispelling_slice.name: Dispelling Slice
dispelling_slice.note: 2 actions: Strike to counteract a spell on the target.

hidden_paragon.name: Hidden Paragon
hidden_paragon.note: When you Hide, you become Undetected instead of Hidden.

implausible_purchase.name: Implausible Purchase
implausible_purchase.note: You can produce any common item as if you had it all along.

impossible_striker.name: Impossible Striker
impossible_striker.note: Strike ignores all cover, concealment, and flat checks to target.

eschew_materials.name: Eschew Materials
eschew_materials.note: Ignore material components that don't have a cost.

hand_of_the_apprentice.name: Hand of the Apprentice
hand_of_the_apprentice.note: 1 action: ranged Strike using melee weapon with spell attack.

widen_spell.name: Widen Spell
widen_spell.note: 1 additional action: increase area of burst, cone, or line spells.

conceal_spell.name: Conceal Spell
conceal_spell.note: Hide that you are casting a spell.

bespell_weapon.name: Bespell Weapon
bespell_weapon.note: Free action: after casting a spell, add 1d6 damage to next Strike.

linked_focus.name: Linked Focus
linked_focus.note: Regain focus point when you spend a focus point on a school spell.

silent_spell.name: Silent Spell
silent_spell.note: 1 additional action: cast a spell without verbal components.

spell_penetration.name: Spell Penetration
spell_penetration.note: +1 to spell attack rolls vs targets with spell resistance.

steady_spellcasting.name: Steady Spellcasting
steady_spellcasting.note: Flat check DC 15 to avoid losing spell when damaged (instead of losing automatically).

bond_conservation.name: Bond Conservation
bond_conservation.note: Use Arcane Bond on a lower-rank spell and prepare a second spell.

overwhelming_energy.name: Overwhelming Energy
overwhelming_energy.note: 1 additional action: your spell ignores 10 resistance.

quickened_casting.name: Quickened Casting
quickened_casting.note: Free action: reduce actions to cast a spell by 1 (once per day).

superior_bond.name: Superior Bond
superior_bond.note: Arcane Bond works twice per day.

clever_counterspell.name: Clever Counterspell
clever_counterspell.note: Counterspell using a different spell of the same school.

spell_combination.name: Spell Combination
spell_combination.note: Combine two spells into one casting.

deadly_simplicity.name: Deadly Simplicity
deadly_simplicity.note: Add extra damage die to favored weapon.

domain_initiate.name: Domain Initiate
domain_initiate.note: Gain a focus spell from your deity's domain.

holy_castigation.name: Holy Castigation
holy_castigation.note: Heal spell damages undead and fiends.

turn_undead.name: Turn Undead
turn_undead.note: Heal spell that damages undead that critically fails also flees.

versatile_font.name: Versatile Font
versatile_font.note: Prepare both heal and harm spells in your font slots.

emblazon_armament.name: Emblazon Armament
emblazon_armament.note: Inscribe a religious symbol on weapon or shield for +1 to hit or hardness.

channel_smite.name: Channel Smite
channel_smite.note: 2 actions: Cast harm/heal on a Strike.

directed_channel.name: Directed Channel
directed_channel.note: 3-action heal/harm targets only enemies or only allies.

raise_symbol.name: Raise Symbol
raise_symbol.note: 1 action: raise holy symbol as shield (+2 AC).

castigating_weapon.name: Castigating Weapon
castigating_weapon.note: After heal harms undead, next Strike vs that undead gets bonus good damage.

command_undead.name: Command Undead
command_undead.note: Use divine font to control undead.

heroic_recovery.name: Heroic Recovery
heroic_recovery.note: Restore an ally's ability to fight by removing frightened/sickened.

deitys_protection.name: Deity's Protection
deitys_protection.note: Gain resistance to damage aligned against your deity.

replenishment_of_war.name: Replenishment of War
replenishment_of_war.note: Heal yourself when you critically hit with favored weapon.

defensive_recovery.name: Defensive Recovery
defensive_recovery.note: Casting heal also gives target +2 AC for 1 round.

fast_channel.name: Fast Channel
fast_channel.note: Cast heal or harm with fewer actions.

shared_replenishment.name: Shared Replenishment
shared_replenishment.note: Communal Healing gives extra HP to all targets.

miraculous_spell.name: Miraculous Spell
miraculous_spell.note: Regain a spell slot of 6th rank or lower.

lingering_composition.name: Lingering Composition
lingering_composition.note: Increase duration of composition cantrips by 1 round.

inspire_defense.name: Inspire Defense
inspire_defense.note: Composition cantrip: allies gain +1 status bonus to AC.

dirge_of_doom.name: Dirge of Doom
dirge_of_doom.note: Composition cantrip: enemies in 30ft emanation are frightened 1.

soothing_ballad.name: Soothing Ballad
soothing_ballad.note: Composition: heal allies in 30ft for 7d8 HP.

wild_shape.name: Wild Shape
wild_shape.note: Cast wild shape focus spell to transform into an animal.

form_control.name: Form Control
form_control.note: Extend wild shape duration; retain more of your abilities in animal form.

poison_resistance.name: Poison Resistance
poison_resistance.note: +2 to saves vs poison; +4 at master Nature.

storm_born.name: Storm Born
storm_born.note: Immune to penalties from wind and precipitation. Add lightning to Storm Order spells.

primal_focus.name: Primal Focus
primal_focus.note: Regain a focus point when you spend a focus point on a druid order spell.

hunted_shot.name: Hunted Shot
hunted_shot.note: 1 action: two ranged Strikes against hunted prey, each at -2.

twin_takedown.name: Twin Takedown
twin_takedown.note: 1 action: two melee Strikes against hunted prey with different weapons.

companion_share.name: Companion's Cry
companion_share.note: Share your Hunt Prey bonus with your animal companion.

skirmish_strike.name: Skirmish Strike
skirmish_strike.note: 1 action: Step then Strike, or Strike then Step.

warden_step.name: Warden's Step
warden_step.note: Ignore difficult terrain from natural environments.

impossible_flurry.name: Impossible Flurry
impossible_flurry.note: 3 actions: Strike three times at full MAP progression.

cackle.name: Cackle
cackle.note: Free action: sustain a hex spell without using an action.

familiar_form.name: Familiar's Form
familiar_form.note: Your familiar can take an additional form.

lesson_of_dreams.name: Lesson of Dreams
lesson_of_dreams.note: Gain a new hex cantrip and familiar ability.

rites_of_convocation.name: Rites of Convocation
rites_of_convocation.note: Summon a patron-themed creature as a ritual.

eldritch_nails.name: Eldritch Nails
eldritch_nails.note: 1 action: unarmed Strike deals spell damage type.

living_hair.name: Living Hair
living_hair.note: Your hair becomes a reach weapon (1d6 damage).

raging_intimidation.name: Raging Intimidation
raging_intimidation.note: Use Demoralize while raging. +2 to Intimidation while raging.

swipe_barbarian.name: Swipe
swipe_barbarian.note: 2 actions: Strike two adjacent foes with one attack roll.

come_and_get_me.name: Come and Get Me
come_and_get_me.note: Stance: enemies provoke reactions from you, but you take -2 AC.

dragon_transformation.name: Dragon Transformation
dragon_transformation.note: Transform into a dragon while raging (dragon instinct).

brutal_critical.name: Brutal Critical
brutal_critical.note: On critical hit, add one extra weapon die.

deific_weapon.name: Deific Weapon
deific_weapon.note: Gain access to your deity's favored weapon at trained proficiency.

ranged_reprisal.name: Ranged Reprisal
ranged_reprisal.note: Your champion reaction works against ranged attacks.

divine_grace.name: Divine Grace
divine_grace.note: Reaction: +2 circumstance bonus to a saving throw.

mercy.name: Mercy
mercy.note: Lay on Hands also removes frightened or sickened.

litany_against_wrath.name: Litany Against Wrath
litany_against_wrath.note: Focus spell: target enemy can't use reactions and takes penalty.

aura_of_courage.name: Aura of Courage
aura_of_courage.note: Allies within 15ft reduce frightened by 1 at start of turn.

shield_paragon.name: Shield Paragon
shield_paragon.note: Shield never takes damage from Shield Block.

dragon_stance.name: Dragon Stance
dragon_stance.note: Stance: 1d10 damage, ignore first square of difficult terrain on Stride.

ki_rush.name: Ki Rush
ki_rush.note: Focus spell: Stride at double speed.

ki_strike.name: Ki Strike
ki_strike.note: Focus spell: unarmed Strike gains +1 status bonus to damage.

stunning_fist.name: Stunning Fist
stunning_fist.note: On Flurry of Blows critical hit, target is stunned 1.

deflect_arrow.name: Deflect Arrow
deflect_arrow.note: Reaction: gain +4 AC vs a ranged attack.

quivering_palm.name: Quivering Palm
quivering_palm.note: Focus spell: delayed lethal strike (Fort save or die).

dangerous_sorcery.name: Dangerous Sorcery
dangerous_sorcery.note: Spells that deal damage add your Charisma modifier to damage.

reach_spell_sorcerer.name: Reach Spell
reach_spell_sorcerer.note: 1 additional action: increase spell range by 30 feet.

arcane_evolution.name: Arcane Evolution
arcane_evolution.note: Add a non-signature spell to your repertoire each day.

crossblooded_evolution.name: Crossblooded Evolution
crossblooded_evolution.note: Gain a spell from a different bloodline tradition.

bloodline_focus.name: Bloodline Focus
bloodline_focus.note: Regain focus point when you cast a bloodline spell.

greater_mental_evolution.name: Greater Mental Evolution
greater_mental_evolution.note: Gain a 6th-rank spell slot from any tradition.

finishing_precision.name: Finishing Precision
finishing_precision.note: Confident Finisher adds extra precision damage.

goading_feint.name: Goading Feint
goading_feint.note: Feint that also gives you panache on success.

charmed_life.name: Charmed Life
charmed_life.note: Reaction: +2 circumstance bonus to a saving throw. Costs panache.

attack_of_opportunity_swashbuckler.name: Attack of Opportunity
attack_of_opportunity_swashbuckler.note: Reaction: Strike when enemy in reach uses manipulate/move/ranged attack.

derring_do.name: Derring-Do
derring_do.note: Treat failure as success on Acrobatics, Athletics checks while you have panache.

perfect_finisher.name: Perfect Finisher
perfect_finisher.note: Finisher that deals maximum precision damage.

that_was_me.name: That's Odd...
that_was_me.note: Identify yourself to suspects for +1 to Gather Information.

athletic_strategist.name: Athletic Strategist
athletic_strategist.note: Use Int instead of Str for Athletics checks vs your studied target.

strategic_assessment.name: Strategic Assessment
strategic_assessment.note: On Devise a Stratagem, learn one of target's stats.

predictive_purchase.name: Predictive Purchase
predictive_purchase.note: You happened to buy just the right item earlier.

forensic_acumen.name: Forensic Acumen
forensic_acumen.note: Recall Knowledge during investigation with +2 circumstance.

connect_the_dots.name: Connect the Dots
connect_the_dots.note: Link clues together for bonus to further investigation.

didactic_strike.name: Didactic Strike
didactic_strike.note: Strategic Strike also tells allies the info you learned.

just_one_more_thing.name: Just One More Thing
just_one_more_thing.note: After Recall Knowledge crit success, ask GM one yes/no question.

expansive_spellstrike.name: Expansive Spellstrike
expansive_spellstrike.note: Use non-melee spells with Spellstrike (area and non-attack spells).

force_fang.name: Force Fang
force_fang.note: Focus spell: force damage Strike that bypasses resistance.

spell_parry.name: Spell Parry
spell_parry.note: Reaction: use your weapon to gain +2 to save vs a spell.

cascade_countermeasure.name: Cascade Countermeasure
cascade_countermeasure.note: Arcane Cascade grants resistance to the damage type of your last spell.

knowledge_is_power.name: Knowledge is Power
knowledge_is_power.note: On successful Recall Knowledge, gain +1 circumstance to attacks vs target.

hasted_assault.name: Hasted Assault
hasted_assault.note: Quickened (only for Spellstrike or Arcane Cascade).

supreme_spellstrike.name: Supreme Spellstrike
supreme_spellstrike.note: Spellstrike that casts two spells simultaneously.

reach_spell_oracle.name: Reach Spell
reach_spell_oracle.note: 1 additional action: increase spell range by 30 feet.

domain_acumen.name: Domain Acumen
domain_acumen.note: Gain a domain spell related to your mystery.

vision_of_weakness.name: Vision of Weakness
vision_of_weakness.note: Focus spell: reveal a target's lowest save.

advanced_revelation.name: Advanced Revelation
advanced_revelation.note: Gain a more powerful revelation spell from your mystery.

mysterious_repertoire.name: Mysterious Repertoire
mysterious_repertoire.note: Add a spell from outside your tradition to your repertoire.

blaze_of_revelation.name: Blaze of Revelation
blaze_of_revelation.note: Push your curse to maximum for one devastating spell.

oracular_providence.name: Oracular Providence
oracular_providence.note: Reduce your curse by 1 step at the start of each day.

natural_skill.name: Natural Skill
natural_skill.note: Gain trained proficiency in two additional skills.

clever_improviser.name: Clever Improviser
clever_improviser.note: Gain Untrained Improvisation; if you already have it, add full level.

heroic_presence.name: Heroic Presence
heroic_presence.note: Once per day, use a hero point to give an ally a hero point.

elven_lore.name: Elven Lore
elven_lore.note: Gain trained in Arcana and Nature.

elven_weapon_familiarity.name: Elven Weapon Familiarity
elven_weapon_familiarity.note: Gain access to elf weapons and treat them as one category simpler.

ageless_patience.name: Ageless Patience
ageless_patience.note: When you use an exploration activity, gain +2 circumstance bonus.

expert_longevity.name: Expert Longevity
expert_longevity.note: Change a skill increase each day during daily prep.

universal_longevity.name: Universal Longevity
universal_longevity.note: Change skill proficiencies daily and gain temporary skill feats.

dwarven_lore.name: Dwarven Lore
dwarven_lore.note: Gain trained in Crafting and Religion.

rock_runner.name: Rock Runner
rock_runner.note: Ignore difficult terrain from stone and rubble.

dwarven_weapon_familiarity.name: Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
dwarven_weapon_familiarity.note: Gain access to dwarf weapons and treat them as one category simpler.

unburdened_iron.name: Unburdened Iron
unburdened_iron.note: Reduce armor speed penalty by 5ft. +5 Speed if no penalty.

mountain_strategy.name: Mountain Strategy
mountain_strategy.note: Gain +2 to Reflex saves and AC vs Shove and Trip.

stonecunning.name: Stonecunning
stonecunning.note: Gain +2 to Perception to notice unusual stonework.

stonewalker.name: Stonewalker
stonewalker.note: Move through stone difficult terrain at full speed.

dwarven_fortitude.name: Dwarven Fortitude
dwarven_fortitude.note: +1 to Fortitude saves. Succeed on Fort saves vs death effects on a natural 1.

halfling_lore.name: Halfling Lore
halfling_lore.note: Gain trained in Acrobatics and Stealth.

sure_feet.name: Sure Feet
sure_feet.note: Success on Acrobatics to Balance is treated as critical success.

halfling_luck.name: Halfling Luck
halfling_luck.note: Once per day, reroll a failed skill check or saving throw.

distracting_shadows.name: Distracting Shadows
distracting_shadows.note: Use larger creatures as cover for Stealth.

guiding_luck.name: Guiding Luck
guiding_luck.note: Halfling Luck can be used on attack rolls, or give reroll to ally.

ceaseless_shadows.name: Ceaseless Shadows
ceaseless_shadows.note: Sneak at full speed in natural environments.

gnome_obsession.name: Gnome Obsession
gnome_obsession.note: Gain trained in a Lore skill and upgrade it one step.

fey_fellowship.name: Fey Fellowship
fey_fellowship.note: +2 circumstance to Perception and saves vs fey.

vivacious_conduit.name: Vivacious Conduit
vivacious_conduit.note: Gain fast healing 1 when you take damage from a fey.

energized_font.name: Energized Font
energized_font.note: Regain a focus point when you use a gnome ancestry ability.

instinctive_obfuscation.name: Instinctive Obfuscation
instinctive_obfuscation.note: Once per day, when targeted by divination, automatically get a critical success on save.

burn_it.name: Burn It!
burn_it.note: Fire damage you deal ignores 1 resistance; +1 to fire damage with persistent fire.

goblin_scuttle.name: Goblin Scuttle
goblin_scuttle.note: Reaction: Step when an ally moves adjacent to you.

rough_rider.name: Rough Rider
rough_rider.note: Gain trained in Nature for Command an Animal with goblin dogs and wolves.

very_sneaky.name: Very Sneaky
very_sneaky.note: +1 to Stealth. You can Sneak between cover.

cave_climber.name: Cave Climber
cave_climber.note: Gain a climb Speed of 20 feet.

very_very_sneaky.name: Very, Very Sneaky
very_very_sneaky.note: When you Sneak, you can Hide at end of Stride.
